title: LLM-Powered Noise Filtering
wikilinks: Hallucinations in Legal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Systems
Proxy-Pointer RAG: Structure Meets Scale at 100% Accuracy with Smarter Retrieval
summary: LLM-powered noise filtering uses a lightweight language model to identify and exclude semantically equivalent noise sections from document indices, outperforming regex-based approaches and enhancing retrieval quality.
